user_query: I'm organizing a family gathering and I want to create a playlist that caters to everyone's musical preferences.

TaskList.description: Collect musical preferences from family members based on their favorite genres and artists.
Search for songs that match the collected preferences and create a diverse playlist.
Fetch detailed information about the selected tracks, including artists and their genres.
Compile the playlist along with artist information and genre details into a shareable format.
Share the compiled playlist with all family members via email or messaging app.
